name: Apex Legends
description:
Home outside the games…

{Haven’t seen many good bots with all, well, almost all Legends for Apex, so I decided to take it into my own hands to do it myself.}

~Slight inspo from Yaboycrimson’s bot on C.ai, it’s an amazing one imo.~

{Side note, Alter isn’t in here, but you can probably add her in your own way, also, if this does good/by request, I might add my own OC to it.}
